data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for one default value per set.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'One default value per set', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on creating offers and managing bookings, but they do not address the validation of default values in the context of biz-defined status sets. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of validation for one default value per set.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of one default value per set.
